fullName: Prof Anwar Hussain Syed Fine Academy of Sciences
chairmanMessage: Welcome to Prof Anwar Hussain Syed Fine Academy of Sciences. Our mission is to provide quality education, moral training and professional guidance under one roof. We focus on concept clarity, personal attention, modern facilities and disciplined academic growth.
vision: Our vision is to develop the academy into a complete educational institution, publisher and learning provider through physical classes, home support and online education.
mission: We aim to support school, college, O/A Level, BS, M.Phil, PhD, PMS and CSS learners through experienced faculty and a result-oriented academic system.
chiefBio: Professor Anwar Hussain Syed was a renowned teacher of English, educationist and inspirational mentor. His academic legacy continues through this academy, which has been established in his honour to promote knowledge, discipline, character and confidence.
